citations.quote: Rent: £4,686.18 Total Rent (including £500 Advance Rent Payment) £28.23 Per Day
The subsequent monthly sums due will be shown on the rent schedule to be provided separately to the Tenant.
If the Tenant's Rent instalments account falls into arrears, the Landlord will be entitled to seek payment from the Tenant's guarantor
Where a Rent account is in arrears by two monthly instalments, the Landlord will be entitled to issue a notice to quit
If you accept the Tenancy Agreement but don't move into the Accommodation, you remain financially liable for the Accommodation fees for the full period
If the tenant has agreed to a 39-week or 51-week tenancy and paid in full for the total duration before 04 September 2025 they are entitled to a 2% discount.

findings.text: Total rent for the tenancy is £4,686.18, including a £500 advance payment, with a daily rate of £28.23.
The rent schedule showing monthly instalments is to be provided separately and is not included in the tenancy agreement.
Arrears of two monthly instalments entitle the landlord to issue a 28-day notice to quit and seek payment from the guarantor.
The tenant remains liable for full accommodation fees even if they do not move in or move out early, until a replacement is found.

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search for the rent schedule referenced in clause 2(a) of NAP-SRC-0010, which is to be provided separately. Also search for any payment records, arrears notices, or guarantor correspondence related to this tenancy. Check the matter's source inventory for any additional documents under categories such as 'rent-schedule', 'payment-records', or 'correspondence'.
proposed_tasks.title: Search for rent schedule and payment records in additional sources

risk_flags.text: Tenant may face eviction and guarantor liability if arrears reach two monthly instalments.
Tenant remains liable for full rent even if they vacate early, unless a replacement is found.
Rent schedule not in the agreement; actual instalment amounts and due dates are unknown.

summary: Reviewed NAP-SRC-0010 (Student Licence) for rent schedule and payment records. The agreement states total rent £4,686.18, with monthly instalments to be provided separately. Arrears of two months trigger notice to quit and guarantor recourse. Tenant remains liable even if not occupying. No rent schedule or payment records found in this source. Proposed follow-up task to search for the separate rent schedule and any payment/arrears documents.

uncertainties.text: The rent schedule with monthly instalment amounts and due dates is not included in the provided source.
It is unclear whether any arrears have accrued or whether a notice to quit has been issued.
No evidence of a replacement tenant search or any communication regarding early termination.
